blockers.description: App crashes with segfault on startup
Cannot verify terminal functionality until crash is fixed

decisions.decision: Create stub implementations for missing functions

decisions.decision: Add tokio runtime with GLib bridge

next_action: Execute plan 01-07 to debug and fix the segmentation fault preventing app startup
context_notes: Phase 01 has 6 completed plans but verification found runtime crash. Created 3 additional gap-closure plans (07-09) to fix crash, implement rendering, and verify all requirements. The app builds successfully but crashes immediately on startup - likely due to Ghostty surface initialization timing or missing GL context setup.
